name: streaming_text
description: Verifies the clean-environment CLI can complete a single streaming assistant turn without tool use.

name: read_file_roundtrip
description: Exercises a read-only file roundtrip where the model reads a local fixture and answers from its contents.

name: grep_chunk_assembly
description: Checks that grep search output is assembled correctly across streamed tool/result turns.

name: write_file_allowed
description: Confirms a workspace-write session can write a file and surface the successful tool roundtrip.

name: write_file_denied
description: Confirms a read-only session denies file writes while preserving a structured tool error response.

name: multi_tool_turn_roundtrip
description: Validates a single turn that chains multiple approved tools and returns a coherent final answer.

name: bash_stdout_roundtrip
description: Exercises unrestricted bash execution and captures stdout through the JSON response envelope.

name: bash_permission_prompt_approved
description: Checks that an approval-gated bash command proceeds when the interactive prompt is approved.

name: bash_permission_prompt_denied
description: Checks that an approval-gated bash command is blocked when the interactive prompt is denied.

name: plugin_tool_roundtrip
description: Verifies an externally discovered plugin tool can be enabled, invoked, and reported through the CLI.

name: auto_compact_triggered
description: Ensures the CLI emits auto-compaction metadata when a resumed session crosses the compaction threshold.

name: token_cost_reporting
description: Ensures token totals and estimated cost fields are present in the structured JSON response.
